Modbus TCP.desc: Improper Authentication in Modbus Server allowing unauthorized command execution.
Modbus protocol lack of encryption allows Man-in-the-Middle traffic sniffing.

Siemens S7.desc: Replay Attack vulnerability in S7 communications.
Denial of Service via crafted PROFINET packets.

Ethernet/IP.desc: Remote Code Execution via crafted Ethernet/IP headers.

FTP.desc: File Transfer Protocol transmits passwords in plaintext.

Telnet.desc: Telnet transmits all sessions data unencrypted.
